# QA Plan - Sprint D Enterprise Auth Hardening

**Date**: 2026-06-29  
**Generated by**: /ultracode workflow  
**Scope**: Sprint D local implementation and governance closure for enterprise authentication/authorization hardening (S017-004 / AUTH-prod)  
**Technology**: Python 3.10+, FastAPI, PyJWT, SQLite, Python SDK, TypeScript SDK  
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-017-external-validation-and-provider-hardening.md`  
**CDD**: `design/cdd/sprint-d-enterprise-auth-hardening.md`

## Context

Sprint D closes the local implementation and governance gaps for the enterprise auth boundary defined in `docs/progress/enterprise-auth-implementation-plan.md`. It covers AUTH-001 through AUTH-008:

- Auth mode gate and fail-closed enterprise startup
- OIDC/JWT middleware with local fixture validation
- Trusted enterprise context mapping
- Persistent tenant-scoped ACL repositories
- Approval and audit actor records
- SDK bearer-token pass-through with redaction
- Remote-bind hardening gate
- SecretProvider port rollout

Sprint D is **not** a production-promotion sprint. Operator-dependent gates (live IdP/JWKS, production secret-store command, SIEM/WORM export, live remote-bind deployment, production data-isolation review, and SDK registry release approval) remain tracked as `pending_operator_action`.

Current closure posture:

- Local implementation: **passed**
- Local smoke evidence: **passed** (refreshed 2026-06-29)
- External gates: **5 open** (live IdP/JWKS, production secret-store, live remote-bind, production data-isolation review, SDK registry release)
- `production_ready`: `false`; `stable_declaration`: `forbidden`; Level 3: `experimental`

## Test Summary

| Item | Type | Test Approach | Required Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| AUTH-001 Auth mode gate | Unit / Startup | `test_api_auth_startup.py` | Startup fails when `DOGE_AUTH_MODE=enterprise` lacks provider; `local_demo` loopback behavior preserved |
| AUTH-002 OIDC/JWT middleware | Unit / Integration | `test_jwt_enterprise_auth_provider.py`, `test_enterprise_auth_provider.py`, `test_tenant_context_middleware.py` | Missing/malformed/expired/wrong-issuer/wrong-audience/wrong-algorithm/invalid-signature tokens return 401; valid fixture token creates trusted principal |
| AUTH-003 Trusted context mapping | Unit / Contract | `test_tenant_context_middleware.py`, `test_enterprise_acl_api.py` | Forged `x-doge-*` headers ignored; raw subject/email not stored in prompts or audit logs |
| AUTH-004 Persistent ACL repositories | Unit / Contract | `test_enterprise_governance_repository.py`, `test_enterprise_acl_api.py` | Deny-by-default ACL checks; tenant partition on documents/portfolios/sessions/runs/events/artifacts/approvals/evidence; cross-tenant access denied |
| AUTH-005 Approval and audit actors | Unit / Integration | `test_enterprise_governance_repository.py`, `test_enterprise_acl_api.py`, `test_runtime_kernel.py` | Approval decisions record actor hash/tenant/request ID; audit events append-only; export has integrity headers; retention purge tenant-scoped |
| AUTH-006 SDK bearer-token pass-through | Contract / SDK | `test_python_sdk.py`, `packages/doge-sdk-typescript/src/__tests__/client.spec.ts` | Bearer and request-id headers pass through JSON/multipart/SSE; errors redact bearer tokens and secrets |
| AUTH-007 Remote-bind hardening gate | Compatibility | `test_api_loopback_guarantee.py`, `doged_remote_bind_gate_smoke.py` | Non-loopback bind rejected by default; approved startup requires enterprise auth, explicit CORS, TLS acknowledgement, and operator override |
| AUTH-008 SecretProvider rollout | Unit / Smoke | `test_secret_provider.py`, `doged_enterprise_process_secret_auth_smoke.py` | Env and process providers resolve secrets; model adapters and auth providers use port; no raw secret in child env |
| Sprint D CDD | Governance | `/design-review` | All 8 product sections present; status `Accepted`; acceptance criteria testable |
| Runtime maturity update | Governance | `validate_governance_yaml_shape.py`, `validate_alpha_maturity_honesty.py` | `sprint_d_enterprise_auth_hardening` section added with honest local/external status; no posture promotion |
| Acceptance report | Governance | Lead/Security/Test review sign-off | `production/qa/evidence/sprint-d-enterprise-auth-hardening-acceptance-2026-06-29.md` with `GO_LOCAL / PENDING_LIVE` verdict |

## Automated Tests Required

### Focused enterprise auth regression

**Commands**:

```powershell
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 -m pytest tests\unit\interfaces\test_api_auth_startup.py tests\unit\interfaces\test_tenant_context_middleware.py tests\unit\infrastructure\test_enterprise_auth_provider.py tests\unit\infrastructure\test_jwt_enterprise_auth_provider.py tests\unit\infrastructure\test_enterprise_governance_repository.py tests\contract\test_enterprise_acl_api.py tests\compat\test_api_loopback_guarantee.py tests\unit\infrastructure\test_secret_provider.py tests\unit\qa\test_doged_enterprise_*_smoke_script.py -q
```

**Pass criteria**:

- All focused tests pass.
- No new failures compared to baseline.
- No test depends on operator credentials or external live services.

### Local doged smoke evidence

**Commands**:

```powershell
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\doged_enterprise_static_auth_smoke.py --output-dir production\qa\evidence\manual
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\doged_enterprise_jwks_auth_smoke.py --output-dir production\qa\evidence\manual
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\doged_enterprise_process_secret_auth_smoke.py --output-dir production\qa\evidence\manual
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\doged_remote_bind_gate_smoke.py --output-dir production\qa\evidence\manual
```

**Pass criteria**:

- All four scripts report `result: passed`.
- Evidence files validate without `--allow-blocked` or `--allow-template` where applicable.
- No raw bearer token, API key, or secret value appears in evidence.

### Governance validators

**Commands**:

```powershell
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\validate_governance_yaml_shape.py docs\progress\runtime-maturity.yaml
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\validate_alpha_maturity_honesty.py --file docs\progress\runtime-maturity.yaml --file README.md --file production\qa\evidence\sprint-d-enterprise-auth-hardening-acceptance-2026-06-29.md
PYTHONPATH=src py -3 scripts\validate_enterprise_production_validation_evidence.py production\qa\evidence\enterprise\enterprise-production-validation-template-2026-06-22.json --allow-template
```

**Pass criteria**:

- All validators exit 0.
- `runtime-maturity.yaml` shape is valid.
- No unqualified production-ready or stable claims exist.
- Enterprise production validation template is still recognized as a template (operator-dependent).

## Manual / Operator QA Checklist

### External window entry criteria

- [ ] Operator-approved IdP/JWKS configuration (issuer, audience, JWKS URL, algorithms, claim mapping).
- [ ] Operator-approved production secret-store backend and command template.
- [ ] Operator-approved SIEM/log-lake target, WORM/immutable storage target, retention/legal-hold policy, collector identity.
- [ ] Operator-approved remote deployment environment with firewall policy, TLS termination, and CORS allow-list.
- [ ] Operator-approved staging/production database snapshot for data-isolation review.
- [ ] Release manager-approved SDK registry target, package ownership, version/changelog policy, and security review.

### Evidence hygiene

- [ ] No raw API keys, bearer tokens, provider secrets, raw subject IDs, raw session/run IDs, or proprietary source documents are committed.
- [ ] Completed evidence is written under `production/qa/evidence/**`, not inside the handoff workspace.
- [ ] `*-template-*`, `*-draft-*`, `*-TEMPLATE`, `TEMPLATE_*`, `<...>`, `$createdAt`, and `YYYY-MM-DD` placeholders are absent from completed evidence.
- [ ] Failed/rejected/needs-revision evidence includes issue refs and does not close the gate.

## Definition Of Done

Sprint D is complete when:

- [ ] Sprint D CDD is `Accepted` and covers all 8 product sections.
- [ ] `docs/progress/runtime-maturity.yaml` records `sprint_d_enterprise_auth_hardening` with local implementation and local smoke evidence as `passed`.
- [ ] All operator-dependent gates are tracked as `pending_operator_action` with clear next actions.
- [ ] Focused enterprise auth tests pass.
- [ ] Four local doged smoke evidence files are refreshed and passing.
- [ ] Governance validators pass.
- [ ] Acceptance report is created with `GO_LOCAL / PENDING_LIVE` verdict.
- [ ] `production_ready`, `stable_declaration`, and Level 3 posture remain unchanged.
